channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SUPREMEIND] Supreme Industries: 84th AGM on July 3, FY26 Dividend ₹25/Share
item.description:
Supreme Industries Ltd. announced that its Board approved audited financial statements for FY26 and recommended a final dividend of ₹25 per share (1250%) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The 84th Annual General Meeting (AGM) is scheduled for July 3, 2026, via Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means. The Register of Members and Share Transfer Books will be closed from June 26 to July 3, 2026, for the purpose of the AGM and final dividend. The record date for dividend entitlement for shares held in electronic form is June 26, 2026. The company will provide e-voting facilities for the AGM. Additionally, the reappointment of Shri V.K. Taparia as Executive Director and the appointment of M S K A & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors for five years were approved, subject to member approval at the ensuing AGM.

  • Board approved FY26 audited financial statements and recommended ₹25/share final dividend.
  • 84th AGM scheduled for July 3, 2026, with book closure from June 26 to July 3.
  • Record date for dividend entitlement for electronic shares is June 26, 2026.
  • Director reappointment and new statutory auditors approved, subject to AGM approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUPREME INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [ORIRAIL] Oriental Rail Infra: No deviation in ₹212.20 Cr preferential issue funds
item.description:
Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd has filed a statement confirming no deviation or variation in the utilization of proceeds raised through a Preferential Issue. The company raised ₹212.20 Crores on February 22, 2024. This report, filed under SEBI Listing Regulations, covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and confirms that the funds were utilized as originally disclosed. CARE Ratings Limited is the designated monitoring agency.

  • No deviation in utilization of funds from Preferential Issue.
  • ₹212.20 Crores raised via Preferential Issue on Feb 22, 2024.
  • Report covers quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • CARE Ratings Limited is the monitoring agency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [BANDHANBNK] Bandhan Bank appoints Sandip Kumar Bubna as Interim CAE
item.description:
Bandhan Bank Limited's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 27, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Sandip Kumar Bubna as the Interim Chief Audit Executive (CAE)/Head of Internal Audit (HIA). This appointment is effective immediately for a period of six months or until a new CAE/HIA joins the Bank, whichever is earlier. This follows the resignation of Mr. Navin Sharma from the position. Mr. Bubna brings over 15 years of experience in internal audit within the banking sector, having joined Bandhan Bank in August 2025 to lead the Information Systems Audit. He is a Chartered Accountant with a Diploma in Information System Audit (DISA) and is a Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP). Prior to Bandhan Bank, he was a Senior Audit Manager at ICICI Bank.

  • Bandhan Bank appointed Sandip Kumar Bubna as Interim Chief Audit Executive.
  • Bubna's appointment is for six months or until a permanent CAE joins.
  • He brings over 15 years of banking internal audit experience.
  • Bubna previously headed Information Systems Audit at Bandhan Bank.
  • He is a Chartered Accountant with strong IT audit credentials.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bandhan Bank Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [UNIMECH] Unimech Aerospace incorporates Uniflux Renewable Energy subsidiary
item.description:
Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd has incorporated a new wholly-owned subsidiary named 'Uniflux Renewable Energy Private Limited'. The subsidiary was incorporated on April 27, 2026, with an initial share capital of ₹1,00,000, fully subscribed by Unimech Aerospace, granting it 100% ownership. This move expands the company's business scope, with the new entity expected to operate in the manufacturing sector, likely related to renewable energy.

  • Unimech Aerospace incorporated Uniflux Renewable Energy Private Limited.
  • The new entity is a 100% wholly-owned subsidiary of Unimech Aerospace.
  • The subsidiary was incorporated on April 27, 2026.
  • Initial share capital of the subsidiary is ₹1,00,000, fully subscribed by the parent company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [TMB] Tamilnad Mercantile Bank: FY26 Net Profit ₹133.76 Cr
item.description:
Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Limited announced its audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹12.50 per equity share (125%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The bank reported a net profit of ₹133.76 Cr for the year ended March 31, 2026, and an EPS of ₹84.47. The Gross NPA is 0.73% and Net NPA is 0.18%.

  • TMB declares a final dividend of ₹12.50 per share for FY26.
  • FY26 Net Profit stands at ₹133.76 Cr, with an EPS of ₹84.47.
  • Gross NPA is 0.73% and Net NPA is 0.18% as of March 31, 2026.
  • The Board approved the audited standalone financial results for FY26.
  • Capital Adequacy Ratio (CAR) under Basel III is 33.73%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ORIRAIL] Oriental Rail: Monitoring Agency Report for ₹212.20 Cr Preferential Allotment
item.description:
Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd has submitted the Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, concerning the utilization of proceeds from its preferential allotment of securities. The report, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, confirms that there has been no deviation in the utilization of the Rs. 212.20 crore issue proceeds from the objects approved by shareholders. This report is mandated by SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018, ensuring transparency in fund utilization.

  • Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26 submitted for preferential allotment.
  • CARE Ratings Limited confirmed no deviation in fund utilization.
  • Rs. 212.20 crore raised through preferential issue.
  • Report ensures compliance with SEBI regulations on fund utilization.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oriental Rail Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [BHARATCOAL] Bharat Coking Coal: Anand Kumar appointed GM, Material Management
item.description:
Bharat Coking Coal Limited announced a change in its Senior Management. Shri Parthaasis Ram, General Manager / HoD (Material Management), has been transferred to another subsidiary of Coal India Limited. Consequently, Shri Anand Kumar has been appointed as the new General Manager / HoD (Material Management) for Bharat Coking Coal Limited, effective April 27, 2026. Shri Anand Kumar will now be a Senior Management Personnel, replacing Shri Parthaasis Ram. Shri Anand Kumar, associated with the company since January 1992, holds a Bachelor of Engineering in Mining Engineering and possesses significant experience in procurement and materials management functions.

  • Shri Parthaasis Ram transferred from GM/HoD Material Management.
  • Shri Anand Kumar appointed as new GM/HoD Material Management.
  • Anand Kumar brings over 30 years of experience in materials management.
  • The management change is effective from April 27, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bharat Coking Coal Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [OIL] Oil India: Hydrocarbon Discovery in Libya Block 95/96
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Oil India Ltd, with a 25% participating interest in an Indian consortium, has announced a new gas and oil discovery in the onshore exploration Block Area 95/96 in Libya's Ghadames Basin. The discovery was made in the sixth well, A1-96/02, drilled by M/s SIPEX. The National Oil Corporation (NOC), Libya, has formally declared it the fifth discovery in the block. Further assessment is planned to evaluate the resource potential and progress towards development.

  • Oil India has a 25% stake in the Libya Block 95/96.
  • The discovery was made in the sixth well, A1-96/02.
  • NOC Libya declared it the fifth discovery in the block.
  • Appraisal activities are planned to assess resource potential.
  • The discovery expands Oil India's international footprint.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OIL INDIA LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TVSSRICHAK] TVS Srichakra opens 15th Eurogrip Tyres exclusive store in Bahraich, UP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

TVS Srichakra Ltd, through its Eurogrip Tyres brand, has opened its 15th exclusive retail store in Bahraich, Uttar Pradesh. This expansion aims to strengthen the brand's retail presence and offer a comprehensive tyre and 2-wheeler care experience. The new outlet provides Eurogrip's full range of tyres and tubes for various 2-wheelers, along with services like professional fitment, puncture repair, and warranty support. This move is part of the company's strategy to expand its branded retail footprint in key markets like Uttar Pradesh, bringing products and services closer to customers.

  • TVS Srichakra launched its 15th Eurogrip Tyres exclusive store in India.
  • New outlet in Bahraich, Uttar Pradesh, strengthens retail presence.
  • Store offers full range of 2 & 3-wheeler tyres and comprehensive services.
  • Expansion is part of a broader strategy to grow branded retail footprint.
  • Uttar Pradesh is identified as a key market for the brand.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TVS SRICHAKRA LTD.-$ | Category: Expansion

item.title: [SMAUTO] SM Auto Stamping Board Meeting on April 30, 2026
item.description:
SM Auto Stamping Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 30, 2026, to consider various agenda items. Key items include approving the resignation and appointment of the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, revising the list of Designated Persons, approving e-form filings, adopting the Internal Audit Report, and appointing Secretarial and Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27. The board will also consider related party transactions and compliance under SEBI regulations.

  • Board to approve resignation and appointment of Company Secretary.
  • Revision of Designated Persons list as per Insider Trading Regulations.
  • Approval for signing and filing e-forms for FY 2026-27.
  • Adoption of Internal Audit Report for Q-3 FY 2025-26 and discussion on Q-4.
  • Appointment of Secretarial and Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SM Auto Stamping Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
